Definitely punches above its price tag! First of all, the plastic used in the case is just ok, i can hear creaking noise when holding it. The earbuds however, gives a premium feel and are light weight, comes with winged tips so they fit very snuggly onto the ears. They can be used for hours without feeling uncomfortable to your ears. On to the sound quality bass is adequate (not overpowering like those chinese copy tws's in the market), the sound stage is fairly wide, you can hear a fair amount of instrument separation.You'll enjoy all type of music with these! i'd say unbelievable for the price.\nIt has a few downsides though, there's no way to know the remaining battery of the case, cant change the gesture controls( no skipping to the previous track, no volume controls), no offear sensor and autopause!\noverall, an amazing product for the price i got it for( nrs 2600)! just go for it.

4. Stiffer erections as it strengthens the nervous system as well. So be careful before giving it to kids. Minimum dosage will be fine.

Overall I am satisfied and recommend Brahmi over Ash

Now coming to the effects. 

1. A dose of 500mg is knocking me out in a good way. So I suggest you not to take Brahmi before driving or at least wait for 90 mins. You will feel a bit drowsy when you take the right dosage. But this effect will wear off.

The same feeling I have experienced when I took Brahmi as a teenager.

3. Strong memory recall from the third day itself. Feels like my original self.

4. Stiffer erections as it strengthens the nervous system as well. So be careful before giving it to kids. Minimum dosage will be fine.

Overall I am satisfied and recommend Brahmi over Ash

Now coming to the effects. 

1. A dose of 500mg is knocking me out in a good way. So I suggest you not to take Brahmi before driving or at least wait for 90 mins. You will feel a bit drowsy when you take the right dosage. But this effect will wear off.

2. Very very relaxed. Like very calm in the head. All the things that bother me have dissipated. Period.
The same feeling I have experienced when I took Brahmi as a teenager.

3. Strong memory recall from the third day itself. Feels like my original self.

4. Stiffer erections as it strengthens the nervous system as well. So be careful before giving it to kids. Minimum dosage will be fine.

Overall I am satisfied and recommend Brahmi over Ash

The same feeling I have experienced when I took Brahmi as a teenager.

3. Strong memory recall from the third day itself. Feels like my original self.

4. Stiffer erections as it strengthens the nervous system as well. So be careful before giving it to kids. Minimum dosage will be fine.

Overall I am satisfied and recommend Brahmi over Ash

I have consumed Brahmi when I was a teenager. That improved my memory, cognition, analytical and logical skills at a very young age. After a long gap of more than a decade I decided to try it again as I was being forgetful about daily tasks and being very stressful due to work related commitments.

Now coming to the effects. 

1. A dose of 500mg is knocking me out in a good way. So I suggest you not to take Brahmi before driving or at least wait for 90 mins. You will feel a bit drowsy when you take the right dosage. But this effect will wear off.

2. Very very relaxed. Like very calm in the head. All the things that bother me have dissipated. Period.
The same feeling I have experienced when I took Brahmi as a teenager.

3. Strong memory recall from the third day itself. Feels like my original self.

4. Stiffer erections as it strengthens the nervous system as well. So be careful before giving it to kids. Minimum dosage will be fine.

Overall I am satisfied and recommend Brahmi over Ash

I have consumed Brahmi when I was a teenager. That improved my memory, cognition, analytical and logical skills at a very young age. After a long gap of more than a decade I decided to try it again as I was being forgetful about daily tasks and being very stressful due to work related commitments.

Now coming to the effects. 

1. A dose of 500mg is knocking me out in a good way. So I suggest you not to take Brahmi before driving or at least wait for 90 mins. You will feel a bit drowsy when you take the right dosage. But this effect will wear off.

2. Very very relaxed. Like very calm in the head. All the things that bother me have dissipated. Period.
The same feeling I have experienced when I took Brahmi as a teenager.

3. Strong memory recall from the third day itself. Feels like my original self.

4. Stiffer erections as it strengthens the nervous system as well. So be careful before giving it to kids. Minimum dosage will be fine.

Overall I am satisfied and recommend Brahmi over Ash

Overall I am satisfied and recommend Brahmi over Ash
